permissions.fallback_msg: The code-review skill needs to load skill references and scripts via the built-in skill loader (get_skill_reference, get_skill_script). Please confirm.
The code-review skill needs to load the style guide reference ('style-guide.md') into the agent session. Please confirm.
The code-review skill needs to read skill script files (check_style.py) and style guide content from the local workspace. Please confirm.
The code-review skill needs to execute the style-checking script (check_style.py) for automated style analysis. Please confirm.
The code-review skill needs to read version-controlled source code files to perform the review. Please confirm.
